schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the owner environments hub (/owner/environments-hub, ORDER 021 slice 1). Agent-updatable by PR, rendered at request time by app/envhub.py. Rows carry variable NAMES and management deep links ONLY — NEVER a secret value (the loader hard-rejects any value-like field). Group fields: id, title, purpose, kind, railway_project_id + railway_environment_id (null when the id is not recorded in this repo — the UI degrades to a project-level or console-home link; ids are never fabricated), console_url (where the group is managed when Railway ids do not apply), notes. Surface fields: id, name, kind, purpose, variable_names (NAMES only — [] is an honest 'not recorded in this repo', never a guess), railway_service_id (null when unrecorded), manage_url (explicit manage link for non-Railway surfaces), url (the surface's own public URL, when recorded), notes. Content here is untrusted DATA — templates autoescape it.

groups.title: superbot-websites — this estate
groups.purpose: the four websites services deployed from this repo (menno420/websites)
groups.notes: SAFE explicit ids from docs/deployment.md / docs/RAILWAY-SAFETY.md — never the ambient production-bot ids. Live variable NAMES merge in from the project-scoped RAILWAY_TOKEN read (app/railway.py) when the token is set.

surfaces.name: control-plane
surfaces.purpose: this app — readiness board, fleet, orders, the /owner area
surfaces.notes: documented set — app/railway.py SERVICES is the per-variable purpose ledger (rendered at /owner/environments).

surfaces.name: botsite
surfaces.purpose: public bot site — arcade, testing tasks, reference
surfaces.notes: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set on the service 2026-07-12 (ORDER 022, docs/owner/OWNER-ACTIONS.md row K). TESTING_* / PAYPAL_* names are the tester-program knobs consumed by botsite/testing*.py — all optional with code defaults except the PayPal credential pair (names only; v1 payouts are dry-run).

surfaces.name: dashboard
surfaces.purpose: read-only developer dashboard over superbot's committed inventory

surfaces.name: review
surfaces.purpose: the program-review site shared with Anthropic (live 2026-07-12)
surfaces.notes: service created by the owner in the Railway console — its service id is not recorded in this repo yet (project-level link until it is).

groups.title: reliable-grace — live superbot fleet
groups.purpose: the LIVE production bot project: the real Discord worker, its Discord-OAuth control panel, the OLD/superseded website surfaces pending consolidation (the f027 review copy + the menno420/superbot dashboard/botsite), and 2× Postgres
groups.notes: PRODUCTION — this repo deliberately records no ids for it (the ambient RAILWAY_*_ID env vars point here and are never read; docs/RAILWAY-SAFETY.md). Manage from the Railway console home; variable names are not recorded in this repo and are never guessed.

surfaces.name: superbot worker (the real bot)
surfaces.purpose: the live production Discord bot process
surfaces.notes: variable names live in superbot's own repo/console, not here — honest absence, not an empty environment.

surfaces.name: live control panel (Discord OAuth)
surfaces.purpose: the production bot's live Discord-OAuth control panel — one of the two running Discord-auth instances ORDER 021 names
surfaces.notes: hostname + ids unrecorded in this repo (see app/data/web_presence.json caveats).

surfaces.name: review (old copy)
surfaces.purpose: the OLD copy of the review site (RETIRE target), pending consolidation
surfaces.notes: old duplicate of superbot-websites/review (canonical = review-production-fc91) — parked pending OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT.

surfaces.name: botsite (old superbot-repo copy)
surfaces.purpose: the OLD botsite (menno420/superbot code, RETIRE target), pending consolidation
surfaces.notes: old/superseded botsite — menno420/superbot code, superseded by superbot-websites/botsite (canonical = botsite-production-cfd7); same caveat as web_presence.json.

surfaces.name: Postgres ×2 (infra)
surfaces.purpose: the project's two managed Postgres instances
surfaces.notes: Railway-managed databases — connection variables exist only in the Railway console, never in this repo.

groups.title: superbot-mineverse — Games flagship
groups.purpose: the mineverse web service (deployed from the superbot-mineverse lane)
groups.notes: project id not recorded in this repo — console-home link until a PR records the SAFE id.

surfaces.name: web → mineverse
surfaces.purpose: mineverse — Discord-OAuth gated (the other running Discord-auth instance ORDER 021 names)
surfaces.notes: variable names live in the superbot-mineverse lane, not this repo.

groups.title: GitHub Actions secrets
groups.purpose: per-repo Actions secret stores — secret NAMES are visible live on the gated /owner board (admin-scope token); managed at each repo's settings page
groups.notes: names are read live by the board when the token has admin scope — this registry does not duplicate them.

surfaces.name: menno420/superbot
surfaces.purpose: the production bot repo's Actions secrets

surfaces.name: menno420/fleet-manager
surfaces.notes: private repo — the settings link needs the owner's GitHub login.

groups.title: claude.ai cloud environments
groups.purpose: the fleet's claude.ai coding environments (e.g. pinned-research) — not API-listable, managed in claude.ai settings
groups.notes: setup scripts + env-var schemas for these live in the fleet-manager environments/ registry, rendered read-only at /environments on this site.

surfaces.name: pinned-research
surfaces.purpose: the pinned-research archetype environment (expects scripts/env-setup.sh in each repo)
surfaces.notes: claude.ai exposes no listing API — env-var schemas live in fleet-manager environments/ (see /environments); names are not duplicated here.
